appliedUpdates.description: Documented the validated Mission worker kill contract in .factory/library/mission-runtime.md, including the shared IPC shape and the JSON-RPC payload sent to Droid.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in mission-ui-worker that when a worker resumes an interrupted draft and the focused feature test already exists, the worker may continue from that baseline instead of forcing a brand-new red test authoring step.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The mission-session-entry-routing-and-sidebar review found the implementation acceptable, but the worker handoff explicitly noted a deviation from the skill's 'write failing tests first' step because the interrupted draft already contained the focused routing/sidebar test coverage.
